name: Kiwanis Park
description: 4 brand new pickleball courts, there is a gazebo that provides shade all hours of the day with picnic tables and room for chairs, concrete cornhole boards (yes they are finished and have a playing surface that wont damage cornhole bags), 18 hole disc golf course, Skatepark, and a super nice playground by the courts.. The City hasn't installed lighting or windscreens yet, but it will be coming in the near future! bring the whole family! super nice park thay the City of Baxter Springs keeps very well maintained and clean!

name: Red Iron Activity Center
description: We provide rackets and balls. We have a large group that plays regularly, at various times during the week. They welcome all newcomers, all ages and abilities. We hold regular classes and clinics with a trained pickleball pro.
open_play_schedule: We use TeamReach to inform players about classes, clinics, times when people are getting together to play. The TeamReach access code is: RIACPB
fees: Members only — Day passes are $5; Single membership: $20/month; Single Senior membership: $15/month
